Toshihiko Seki
Characters voiced Asuka's father, Langley
Birthday 06-11-1962


A selection of other characters voiced by Toshihiko Seki[edit]

Bleach as Kaien Shiba and Aaroniero Arruruerie

Fullmetal Alchemist as Vercio

Gundam SEED as Rau Le Creuset

Gundam SEED Destiny as Rey Za Burrel

Gundam Wing as Duo Maxwell

Gunslinger Girl as Nino

Paranoia Agent as Mitsuhiro Maniwa

Please Save My Earth as Mikuro Yakushimaru

Sgt. Frog as Urere

RahXephon as Makoto Isshiki

Ranma ½ - Mousse
